## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between LightSource and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, personas, and next steps for their collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Personas refined: CPO (30%), Procurement Manager (30%), Procurement IT (20%), Finance (10-15%), Design Engineering (5-10%)](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)
  - [Content strategy clusters approved: Direct materials procurement, RFX optimization, AI-native procurement, ROI focus, and spec-to-scale category creation](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=968.0)
  - [LightSource shared their "spec to scale manifesto" as a cornerstone asset for category creation](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1592.0)
  - [Weekly meetings set for Thursdays at 11am Pacific, starting in two weeks](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)

## Topics

### Persona Refinement

  - [CPO/Chief Supply Chain Officer: Senior-level, focused on procurement and supply continuity](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Strategic Sourcing Manager: Various titles, interfacing between engineering and suppliers](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Finance Partner: Leaning towards strategic finance, managing bill of materials costs and CapEx](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=553.0)
  - [New addition: Procurement/Supply Chain IT, supporting digital tools and technologies](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Emerging role: AI Transformation Lead, evaluating AI tools across different use cases](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)

### Content Strategy Clusters

  - [Direct Materials Procurement Fundamentals: Definitions, how-tos, glossaries](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
  - [RFX and Sourcing Process Optimization: Emphasizing speed and efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1135.0)
  - [AI-Native Procurement: Unique differentiator for LightSource](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)
  - [ROI and Strategic Value: Focus on structural cost improvement beyond traditional cost savings](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Spec to Scale Category Creation: Supports direct materials focus and community building](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1420.0)

### Atlas Platform Overview

  - [Internal content generation platform housing artifacts, personas, and guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)
  - [Generates assignments and article drafts based on set parameters](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=1930.0)
  - [Includes research agents, fact-checking, and SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)

### Content Production Process

  - [GrowthX to publish drafts to LightSource's Framer staging site](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)
  - [LightSource team to review and approve before going live](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2099.0)
  - [Discussion on incorporating more engaging visuals and infographics in blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to update personas based on new weightings and feedback](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=844.0)
  - [LightSource to provide access to Framer, Google Analytics, and Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2631.0)
  - [GrowthX to begin keyword research and develop initial content assignments](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2668.0)
  - [Design team to explore options for blog post visuals and infographics](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2224.0)
  - [Set up recurring weekly meeting for Thursdays at 11am Pacific (pending final confirmation)](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide async updates next week due to DPW conference](https://fathom.video/share/MyvzEz8zJzexb5YWo8ri3aFxUAVr8q5s?tab=summary&timestamp=2436.0)
